locality_rule: Single-word locality names require geographical context; person surnames are not accepted as locations.
story_identity_rule: Stories are clustered by named entities, subject terms, area, category and date; interviews/reactions are merged into the underlying announcement where they describe the same event.
selection_policy: One story is reserved for each represented category and each represented official ward before source-rotating fill selection.
